hooks.command: powershell -Command "$cmd = $env:TOOL_INPUT; $dangerous = @('format ', 'diskpart', 'reg delete', 'net user', 'shutdown'); foreach ($d in $dangerous) { if ($cmd -like "*$d*") { Write-Output 'BLOCK'; exit 1 } }"
powershell -Command "cd $env:USERPROFILE\.claude; if (git status --porcelain) { git add -A; git commit -m 'auto: claude config update' }"
